Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IHeadTrackCapability

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IObservableProperty
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
  • public class IHeadTrackCapability
extends IObservableProperty

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      protected IHeadTrackCapability​(long cPtr, boolean cMemoryOwn)  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void activateAutoReset()
      Activates the auto-reset feature for head tracking

      NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

      Auto-reset automatically resets the head tracking orientation when the user
      has remained still for a defined period of time.

      An asynchronous request to activate auto reset for head tracking.
      void deactivateAutoReset()
      Deactivates the auto-reset feature for head tracking

      NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

      See activate_auto_reset for more info.

      An asynchronous request to deactivate auto reset for head tracking.
      void delete()  
      protected void finalize()  
      protected static long getCPtr​(IHeadTrackCapability obj)  
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventActivateAutoResetConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the auto-reset feature has been activated.

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      activate_auto_reset request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventDeactivateAutoResetConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the auto-reset feature has been deactivated.

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      deactivate_auto_reset request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventResetConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the head tracking orientation has been reset.

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      reset request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetStateConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the state has been set.

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      set_state request.
      HeadTrackState getState()
      Returns the current state
      boolean isAutoResetActive()
      Check if auto-reset is active

      NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

      If interaction with the auto-reset feature is not supported, this function
      will return false.
      boolean isAutoResetSupported()
      Check if the auto-reset feature is supported

      Determines if the auto-reset feature can be interacted with on the device.
      void reset()
      Resets the head tracking orientation

      An asynchronous request to reset the head tracking orientation.
      void setState​(HeadTrackState state)
      Set the HeadTrackState

      An asynchronous request to set the state of the HeadTrackCapability.
      protected void swigSetCMemOwn​(boolean own)

      • delete

        public void delete()
        Overrides:
        delete in class IObservableProperty

      • setState

        public void setState​(HeadTrackState state)
        Set the HeadTrackState

        An asynchronous request to set the state of the HeadTrackCapability. Observers will be notified with
        event get_observable_event_set_state_confirmation when the change has been
        confirmed by the remote device.

        Parameters:
        state - The desired state

      • getState

        public HeadTrackState getState()
        Returns the current state

        Returns:
        The current state

      • reset

        public void reset()
        Resets the head tracking orientation

        An asynchronous request to reset the head tracking orientation. Observers will be notified with
        event get_observable_event_reset_confirmation when the change has been
        confirmed by the remote device.

      • activateAutoReset

        public void activateAutoReset()
        Activates the auto-reset feature for head tracking

        NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

        Auto-reset automatically resets the head tracking orientation when the user
        has remained still for a defined period of time.

        An asynchronous request to activate auto reset for head tracking. Observers will be notified with
        event get_observable_event_activate_auto_reset_confirmation when the change has been
        confirmed by the remote device.

      • deactivateAutoReset

        public void deactivateAutoReset()
        Deactivates the auto-reset feature for head tracking

        NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

        See activate_auto_reset for more info.

        An asynchronous request to deactivate auto reset for head tracking. Observers will be notified with
        event get_observable_event_deactivate_auto_reset_confirmation when the change has been
        confirmed by the remote device.

      • isAutoResetActive

        public boolean isAutoResetActive()
        Check if auto-reset is active

        NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

        If interaction with the auto-reset feature is not supported, this function
        will return false. The feature may still be active on the device, but its
        state cannot be modified.

        Returns:
        True if it is active, false if inactive.

      • isAutoResetSupported

        public boolean isAutoResetSupported()
        Check if the auto-reset feature is supported

        Determines if the auto-reset feature can be interacted with on the device. The feature
        may be supported by the device, but still not allow certain operations, such as requesting
        deactivation.

        Returns:
        True if it is supported, false if not.

      • getObservableEventSetStateConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetStateConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the state has been set.

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_state request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventResetConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventResetConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the head tracking orientation has been reset.

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        reset request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventActivateAutoResetConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventActivateAutoResetConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the auto-reset feature has been activated.

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        activate_auto_reset request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventDeactivateAutoResetConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventDeactivateAutoResetConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the auto-reset feature has been deactivated.

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        deactivate_auto_reset request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.
